User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the Shree Label ERP system, managing access and authentication details (excluding sensitive credentials).

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

username.description: Unique username for logging into the system.

email.description: User's email address, used for communication and potentially recovery.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

roleId.description: Reference to the Role entity, defining the user's permissions and access level. (Relationship: Role 1:N User)

isActive.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Defines user roles and their associated permissions within the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Role entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the role's responsibilities and privileges.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Stores information about a customer, including contact details and billing information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

name.description: The official name of the customer company.

contactPerson.description: The primary contact person at the customer company.

email.description: The email address of the customer's contact person.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the customer.

address.description: The billing and primary physical address of the customer.

gstNumber.description: The Goods and Services Tax (GST) registration number of the customer.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Manages master data for various materials used in production, such as jumbo rolls and inks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Material entity.

name.description: The name of the material (e.g., 'Coated Paper 80 GSM', 'UV Ink Red').

type.description: The category or type of the material (e.g., 'Jumbo Roll', 'Ink', 'Adhesive').

description.description: A detailed description of the material's properties or usage.

gsm.description: Grammage of the material in grams per square meter (GSM), applicable for paper/film materials.

ratePerSqMeter.description: The standard rate of the material per square meter, used for costing.

unitOfMeasure.description: The standard unit of measure for this material (e.g., 'sq meter', 'kg', 'liter').

widthMm.description: The standard width of the material in millimeters, primarily for roll materials like Jumbo Rolls.

Machine.title: Machine
Machine.description: Stores master data for various production machines, including their capabilities and operating costs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Machine entity.

name.description: The name or model of the machine (e.g., 'Flexo Printing Machine A').

type.description: The category or type of machine (e.g., 'Printing Machine', 'Slitting Machine', 'Rewinding Machine').

maxPrintingWidthMm.description: The maximum printing width in millimeters supported by this machine, applicable to printing machines.

maxSlittingWidthMm.description: The maximum slitting width in millimeters supported by this machine, applicable to slitting machines.

speedMetersPerMin.description: The operational speed of the machine in meters per minute.

costPerHour.description: The standard operational cost of the machine per hour, used for costing.

description.description: A detailed description of the machine's features or specifications.

Cylinder.title: Cylinder
Cylinder.description: Stores master data for flexo printing cylinders, including their specific repeat lengths.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cylinder entity.

name.description: The name or identifier of the cylinder (e.g., 'Cylinder 508mm').

repeatLengthMm.description: The physical repeat length of the printing cylinder in millimeters.

description.description: A detailed description of the cylinder.

Die.title: Die
Die.description: Manages master data for cutting dies used in label production, including their cost and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Die entity.

name.description: The name or identifier of the die (e.g., 'Round 50mm Die').

description.description: A detailed description of the die, including its shape or specific use.

cost.description: The one-time purchase or manufacturing cost of the die.

status.description: The current status of the die (e.g., 'Available', 'In Use', 'Maintenance', 'Retired').

shape.description: The geometric shape of the die cut (e.g., 'Round', 'Square', 'Oval', 'Custom').

PrintingRate.title: PrintingRate
PrintingRate.description: Defines the standard rate for printing operations per running meter.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PrintingRate entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the printing rate (e.g., 'Standard Flexo Rate').

ratePerRunningMeter.description: The cost of printing per running meter of material.

effectiveDate.description: The date from which this rate becomes effective.

description.description: A brief explanation of the printing rate.

UvRate.title: UvRate
UvRate.description: Defines the standard rate for UV coating or printing operations per running meter.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UvRate entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the UV rate (e.g., 'Standard UV Varnish Rate').

ratePerRunningMeter.description: The cost of UV application per running meter of material.

effectiveDate.description: The date from which this rate becomes effective.

description.description: A brief explanation of the UV rate.

InkRate.title: InkRate
InkRate.description: Defines the standard rate for ink consumption per running meter per color.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InkRate entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the ink rate (e.g., 'Standard Process Ink Rate').

ratePerRunningMeterPerColor.description: The cost of ink per running meter, per printing color.

effectiveDate.description: The date from which this rate becomes effective.

description.description: A brief explanation of the ink rate.

LaborRate.title: LaborRate
LaborRate.description: Defines the standard labor cost per hour for production activities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LaborRate entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the labor rate (e.g., 'Standard Operator Rate').

ratePerHour.description: The cost of labor per hour.

effectiveDate.description: The date from which this rate becomes effective.

description.description: A brief explanation of the labor rate.

PlateRate.title: PlateRate
PlateRate.description: Defines the standard cost for printing plates per color.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PlateRate entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the plate rate (e.g., 'Standard Flexo Plate Cost').

ratePerColor.description: The cost of one printing plate per color.

effectiveDate.description: The date from which this rate becomes effective.

description.description: A brief explanation of the plate rate.

Estimate.title: Estimate
Estimate.description: Represents a detailed cost and layout estimation for a label printing job, including all calculated parameters and costs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Estimate entity.

estimateNumber.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for the estimate.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer for whom the estimate is created. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Estimate)

materialId.description: Reference to the primary Material chosen for this estimate. (Relationship: Material 1:N Estimate)

machineId.description: Reference to the primary Machine selected for this estimate. (Relationship: Machine 1:N Estimate)

cylinderId.description: Reference to the Cylinder used for this estimate's repeat length calculation. (Relationship: Cylinder 1:N Estimate)

printingRateId.description: Reference to the PrintingRate used for this estimate. (Relationship: PrintingRate 1:N Estimate)

uvRateId.description: Reference to the UvRate used for this estimate. (Relationship: UvRate 1:N Estimate)

inkRateId.description: Reference to the InkRate used for this estimate. (Relationship: InkRate 1:N Estimate)

laborRateId.description: Reference to the LaborRate used for this estimate. (Relationship: LaborRate 1:N Estimate)

plateRateId.description: Reference to the PlateRate used for this estimate. (Relationship: PlateRate 1:N Estimate)

dieId.description: Reference to the Die required for this estimate, if applicable. (Relationship: Die 1:N Estimate)

estimateDate.description: The date when the estimate was created.

productCode.description: An internal code or identifier for the estimated label product.

labelWidthMm.description: The width of a single label in millimeters.

labelLengthMm.description: The length of a single label in millimeters.

gapMm.description: The gap between labels (both across and around) in millimeters.

sideMarginMm.description: The margin on each side of the printing web in millimeters.

numberOfUvColors.description: The number of UV colors specified for the label.

numberOfWaterBasedColors.description: The number of water-based colors specified for the label.

orderQuantity.description: The total number of labels ordered or estimated.

wastagePercentage.description: The estimated percentage of material wastage during production (e.g., 5 for 5%).

availablePrintingWidthMm.description: The calculated available printing width after accounting for side margins.

labelAcross.description: The number of labels that can be printed across the web.

labelAround.description: The number of labels that fit around the cylinder repeat length.

labelsPerRepeat.description: The total number of labels printed in one cylinder repeat.

repeatsRequired.description: The total number of cylinder repeats required to produce the order quantity.

runningMeter.description: The total running length of material (in meters) required for printing.

materialConsumptionSqMeter.description: The net material consumed in square meters, excluding wastage.

totalMaterialRequiredSqMeter.description: The total material required in square meters, including wastage.

slittingWidthMm.description: The calculated width in millimeters for slitting jumbo rolls for this job.

numberOfSlitRollsFromJumbo.description: The estimated number of slit rolls obtainable from a standard jumbo roll width.

balanceJumboWidthMm.description: The remaining jumbo roll width in millimeters after optimal slitting for this job.

materialCost.description: The calculated cost of raw materials for the estimate.

inkCost.description: The calculated cost of inks for the estimate.

plateCost.description: The calculated cost of printing plates for the estimate.

machineCost.description: The calculated machine cost for the estimate based on running time.

laborCost.description: The calculated labor cost for the estimate based on running time.

totalProductionCost.description: The sum of all calculated production costs (material, ink, plate, machine, labor).

costPerLabel.description: The calculated production cost per single label.

sellingPrice.description: The proposed selling price for the estimated job.

profit.description: The calculated profit for the estimated job.

profitPercentage.description: The calculated profit margin as a percentage.

status.description: The current status of the estimate (e.g., 'Draft', 'Submitted', 'Approved', 'Rejected', 'Converted to SO').

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created this estimate. (Relationship: User 1:N Estimate)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the estimate was created.

updatedById.description: Reference to the User who last updated this estimate. (Relationship: User 1:N Estimate)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the estimate was last updated.

Artwork.title: Artwork
Artwork.description: Manages design artwork files and versions associated with estimates or sales orders.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Artwork entity.

name.description: The name of the artwork file.

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate this artwork is associated with. (Relationship: Estimate 1:N Artwork)

version.description: The version identifier of the artwork (e.g., '1.0', '2.1').

filePath.description: The URI or path to the stored artwork file.

uploadDate.description: Timestamp when the artwork file was uploaded.

description.description: A detailed description or notes about the artwork.

uploadedById.description: Reference to the User who uploaded the artwork. (Relationship: User 1:N Artwork)

BillOfMaterial.title: BillOfMaterial
BillOfMaterial.description: Defines the Bill of Material (BOM) for a product, detailing all required components and resources.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BillOfMaterial entity.

bomNumber.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for the BOM.

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate from which this BOM was generated. (Relationship: Estimate 1:N BillOfMaterial)

salesOrderId.description: Optional reference to a SalesOrder if the BOM is created for a confirmed order. (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N BillOfMaterial)

bomDate.description: The date when the BOM was created.

description.description: A detailed description of the BOM or the product it represents.

status.description: The current status of the BOM (e.g., 'Draft', 'Approved', 'Released').

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created this BOM. (Relationship: User 1:N BillOfMaterial)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the BOM was created.

BomComponent.title: BomComponent
BomComponent.description: Details a single component or resource required within a Bill of Material (e.g., material, machine usage, die, plate, ink).

id.description: Unique identifier for the BomComponent entity.

bomId.description: Reference to the BillOfMaterial this component belongs to. (Relationship: BillOfMaterial 1:N BomComponent)

materialId.description: Optional reference to a Material for material or ink components. (Relationship: Material 1:N BomComponent)

machineId.description: Optional reference to a Machine for machine usage components. (Relationship: Machine 1:N BomComponent)

dieId.description: Optional reference to a Die for die usage components. (Relationship: Die 1:N BomComponent)

plateRateId.description: Optional reference to a PlateRate for plate usage components. (Relationship: PlateRate 1:N BomComponent)

quantity.description: The required quantity of the component (e.g., square meters of material, liters of ink, hours of machine use, pieces of plates).

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure for the component quantity (e.g., 'sq meter', 'liter', 'hours', 'pieces').

notes.description: Additional notes or details about the component.

SalesOrder.title: SalesOrder
SalesOrder.description: Represents a confirmed customer order, typically converted from an estimate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SalesOrder entity.

orderNumber.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for the sales order.

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate from which this sales order was generated. (Relationship: Estimate 1:N SalesOrder)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who placed the order. (Relationship: Customer 1:N SalesOrder)

orderDate.description: The date when the sales order was placed or confirmed.

deliveryDate.description: The requested or promised delivery date for the order.

status.description: The current status of the sales order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Confirmed', 'In Production', 'Completed', 'Cancelled').

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the sales order.

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created this sales order. (Relationship: User 1:N SalesOrder)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the sales order was created.

updatedById.description: Reference to the User who last updated this sales order. (Relationship: User 1:N SalesOrder)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the sales order was last updated.

JobCard.title: JobCard
JobCard.description: Details a specific production job, derived from an estimate or sales order, outlining tasks, materials, and resources.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobCard entity.

jobCardNumber.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for the job card (e.g., 'JOB-00001').

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the SalesOrder associated with this job card. (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N JobCard)

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate providing the product specifications for this job card. (Relationship: Estimate 1:N JobCard)

productionQuantity.description: The actual quantity of labels or items to be produced for this job.

startDate.description: The planned start date for the job card.

dueDate.description: The planned due date for the job card completion.

status.description: The current status of the job card (e.g., 'New', 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'On Hold', 'Completed', 'Canceled').

notes.description: General notes or instructions for the job card.

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created this job card. (Relationship: User 1:N JobCard)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job card was created.

JobCardAssignment.title: JobCardAssignment
JobCardAssignment.description: Assigns machines or operators to a specific job card, tracking their scheduled and actual usage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobCardAssignment entity.

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard to which the entity is assigned. (Relationship: JobCard 1:N JobCardAssignment)

assignedEntityType.description: The type of entity being assigned ('Machine' or 'Operator').

entityId.description: Reference to the Machine or User (operator) being assigned. (Relationship: Machine 1:N JobCardAssignment, User 1:N JobCardAssignment)

assignedStartTime.description: The planned start time for the assignment.

assignedEndTime.description: The planned end time for the assignment.

actualStartTime.description: The actual start time of the assignment.

actualEndTime.description: The actual end time of the assignment.

status.description: The current status of the assignment (e.g., 'Assigned', 'Started', 'Completed').

JobCardMaterialRequirement.title: JobCardMaterialRequirement
JobCardMaterialRequirement.description: Lists the materials required and issued for a specific job card.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobCardMaterialRequirement entity.

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard for which the material is required. (Relationship: JobCard 1:N JobCardMaterialRequirement)

materialId.description: Reference to the Material required. (Relationship: Material 1:N JobCardMaterialRequirement)

requiredQuantity.description: The quantity of material required for the job.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure for the required material (e.g., 'sq meter', 'liter').

issuedQuantity.description: The quantity of material actually issued from inventory for the job.

notes.description: Additional notes about the material requirement.

ProductionRun.title: ProductionRun
ProductionRun.description: Tracks a specific run on a machine during the production process for a job card.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductionRun entity.

productionRunNumber.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for the production run (e.g., 'PR-00001').

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard this production run belongs to. (Relationship: JobCard 1:N ProductionRun)

machineId.description: Reference to the Machine used for this production run. (Relationship: Machine 1:N ProductionRun)

operatorId.description: Reference to the User (operator) overseeing this production run. (Relationship: User 1:N ProductionRun)

startTime.description: The actual start time of the production run.

endTime.description: The actual end time of the production run.

startMeterReading.description: The machine's meter reading at the start of the run.

endMeterReading.description: The machine's meter reading at the end of the run.

meterProduced.description: The quantity of good material produced in meters during this run.

wasteMeter.description: The quantity of waste generated in meters during this run.

status.description: The current status of the production run (e.g., 'Started', 'Paused', 'Completed', 'Aborted').

notes.description: Additional notes or observations about the production run.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the production run record was created.

ProductionLogEntry.title: ProductionLogEntry
ProductionLogEntry.description: Logs events and activities that occur during a production run.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductionLogEntry entity.

productionRunId.description: Reference to the ProductionRun this log entry belongs to. (Relationship: ProductionRun 1:N ProductionLogEntry)

timestamp.description: The exact time when the event occurred.

eventType.description: The type of event logged (e.g., 'Start', 'Pause', 'Resume', 'Material Change', 'Defect Logged').

loggedById.description: Reference to the User who logged this event. (Relationship: User 1:N ProductionLogEntry)

InventoryItem.title: InventoryItem
InventoryItem.description: A base entity for all physical stock items, providing common attributes and barcode tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InventoryItem entity.

barcode.description: A unique barcode for the inventory item (e.g., JMB-00001, SLT-00001, FG-00001).

itemType.description: The specific type of inventory item (e.g., 'Jumbo Roll', 'Slitted Roll', 'WIP', 'Finished Good', 'Other Material').

currentQuantity.description: The current quantity of the item in stock (e.g., number of rolls, pieces, kg).

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure for the current quantity.

location.description: The physical location of the inventory item (e.g., 'Warehouse A', 'Printing Floor').

status.description: The current status of the inventory item (e.g., 'Available', 'Reserved', 'In Use', 'Quarantined').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the inventory item record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the inventory item record was last updated.

JumboRollInventory.title: JumboRollInventory
JumboRollInventory.description: Specific details for jumbo rolls in inventory, referencing the generic InventoryItem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JumboRollInventory entity.

inventoryItemId.description: Reference to the base InventoryItem for common attributes and barcode. (Relationship: InventoryItem 1:N JumboRollInventory)

materialId.description: Reference to the Material master data for this jumbo roll's type. (Relationship: Material 1:N JumboRollInventory)

jumboWidthMm.description: The actual width of the jumbo roll in millimeters.

lengthMeters.description: The initial length of the jumbo roll in meters.

weightKg.description: The weight of the jumbo roll in kilograms.

batchNumber.description: The manufacturer's batch number for the jumbo roll.

purchaseOrderId.description: Reference to the PurchaseOrder through which this jumbo roll was acquired. (Relationship: PurchaseOrder 1:N JumboRollInventory)

SlittedRollInventory.title: SlittedRollInventory
SlittedRollInventory.description: Specific details for slitted rolls in inventory, referencing the generic InventoryItem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SlittedRollInventory entity.

inventoryItemId.description: Reference to the base InventoryItem for common attributes and barcode. (Relationship: InventoryItem 1:N SlittedRollInventory)

jumboRollInventoryId.description: Reference to the original JumboRollInventory from which this roll was slitted. (Relationship: JumboRollInventory 1:N SlittedRollInventory)

slitWidthMm.description: The width of the slitted roll in millimeters.

lengthMeters.description: The length of the slitted roll in meters.

weightKg.description: The weight of the slitted roll in kilograms.

productionRunId.description: Reference to the ProductionRun (slitting run) that created this roll. (Relationship: ProductionRun 1:N SlittedRollInventory)

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard for which this roll was slitted. (Relationship: JobCard 1:N SlittedRollInventory)

FinishedGoodInventory.title: FinishedGoodInventory
FinishedGoodInventory.description: Specific details for finished goods in inventory, referencing the generic InventoryItem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FinishedGoodInventory entity.

inventoryItemId.description: Reference to the base InventoryItem for common attributes and barcode. (Relationship: InventoryItem 1:N FinishedGoodInventory)

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard that produced these finished goods. (Relationship: JobCard 1:N FinishedGoodInventory)

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the SalesOrder associated with these finished goods. (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N FinishedGoodInventory)

estimateId.description: Reference to the Estimate that defined these finished goods. (Relationship: Estimate 1:N FinishedGoodInventory)

productCode.description: The product code of the finished label from the estimate.

labelsPerRoll.description: The number of labels contained in each individual finished roll or package.

totalLabels.description: The total number of finished labels in this specific inventory item (e.g., a box of rolls).

packingDetails.description: Details about how the finished goods are packed (e.g., '10 rolls per box', 'on pallet').

productionDate.description: The date when these finished goods were produced.

WorkInProcessInventory.title: WorkInProcessInventory
WorkInProcessInventory.description: Specific details for work-in-process (WIP) items in inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkInProcessInventory entity.

inventoryItemId.description: Reference to the base InventoryItem for common attributes and barcode. (Relationship: InventoryItem 1:N WorkInProcessInventory)

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard associated with this WIP item. (Relationship: JobCard 1:N WorkInProcessInventory)

productionRunId.description: Reference to the last ProductionRun that processed this WIP item. (Relationship: ProductionRun 1:N WorkInProcessInventory)

materialId.description: Reference to the Material that this WIP item is derived from (e.g., partially printed roll material). (Relationship: Material 1:N WorkInProcessInventory)

stage.description: The current stage of production for this WIP item (e.g., 'After Slitting', 'After Printing', 'After Rewinding').

quantityLabels.description: The estimated number of labels on the WIP roll/item, if trackable at this stage.

quantityMeters.description: The remaining length of material in meters for the WIP item.

InventoryTransaction.title: InventoryTransaction
InventoryTransaction.description: Records all movements and adjustments of inventory items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InventoryTransaction entity.

inventoryItemId.description: Reference to the InventoryItem involved in this transaction. (Relationship: InventoryItem 1:N InventoryTransaction)

quantity.description: The quantity of the item moved in this transaction.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure for the transaction quantity.

transactionDate.description: The date and time when the transaction occurred.

sourceReferenceType.description: The type of document or process that triggered this transaction (e.g., 'PurchaseOrder', 'ProductionRun', 'DispatchChallan', 'Adjustment').

sourceReferenceId.description: Reference to the specific document or process that triggered this transaction (e.g., `purchaseOrderId`, `productionRunId`).

notes.description: Additional notes about the inventory transaction.

transactedById.description: Reference to the User who recorded this transaction. (Relationship: User 1:N InventoryTransaction)

PurchaseOrder.title: PurchaseOrder
PurchaseOrder.description: Manages purchase orders placed with suppliers for raw materials and other items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PurchaseOrder entity.

poNumber.description: A unique, human-readable purchase order number.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier from whom the items are being purchased. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N PurchaseOrder)

orderDate.description: The date when the purchase order was placed.

requiredDate.description: The date by which the ordered items are required.

status.description: The current status of the purchase order (e.g., 'Draft', 'Ordered', 'Partial Received', 'Received', 'Cancelled').

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the purchase order.

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created this purchase order. (Relationship: User 1:N PurchaseOrder)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the purchase order was created.

PurchaseOrderItem.title: PurchaseOrderItem
PurchaseOrderItem.description: Details a single item within a purchase order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PurchaseOrderItem entity.

purchaseOrderId.description: Reference to the PurchaseOrder this item belongs to. (Relationship: PurchaseOrder 1:N PurchaseOrderItem)

materialId.description: Reference to the Material being purchased. (Relationship: Material 1:N PurchaseOrderItem)

orderedQuantity.description: The quantity of the material ordered.

receivedQuantity.description: The quantity of the material already received.

unitPrice.description: The unit price of the ordered material.

lineTotal.description: The total cost for this line item (ordered quantity * unit price).

notes.description: Additional notes about the purchase order item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.

name.description: The official name of the supplier company.

contactPerson.description: The primary contact person at the supplier company.

email.description: The email address of the supplier's contact person.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the supplier.

address.description: The billing and primary physical address of the supplier.

gstNumber.description: The Goods and Services Tax (GST) registration number of the supplier.

QualityCheck.title: QualityCheck
QualityCheck.description: Records details of a quality control check performed during or after production.

id.description: Unique identifier for the QualityCheck entity.

jobCardId.description: Reference to the JobCard being inspected. (Relationship: JobCard 1:N QualityCheck)

productionRunId.description: Reference to the specific ProductionRun associated with this check. (Relationship: ProductionRun 1:N QualityCheck)

checkDate.description: The date and time when the quality check was performed.

inspectorId.description: Reference to the User who performed the quality check. (Relationship: User 1:N QualityCheck)

status.description: The overall status of the quality check (e.g., 'Passed', 'Failed', 'Rework Required', 'Approved').

notes.description: General notes or observations from the quality inspection.

checkedQuantity.description: The quantity of items/labels that were inspected.

defectiveQuantity.description: The quantity of items/labels found to be defective.

passedQuantity.description: The quantity of items/labels that passed the quality check.

Defect.title: Defect
Defect.description: Master data for common defects found in label production.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Defect entity.

name.description: The name of the defect (e.g., 'Ink Smudge', 'Misregistration', 'Die Cut Error').

description.description: A detailed description of the defect.

severity.description: The severity level of the defect (e.g., 'Minor', 'Major', 'Critical').

QualityCheckDefect.title: QualityCheckDefect
QualityCheckDefect.description: Links a specific quality check to one or more detected defects, indicating the quantity of each defect.

id.description: Unique identifier for the QualityCheckDefect entity.

qualityCheckId.description: Reference to the QualityCheck where the defect was found. (Relationship: QualityCheck 1:N QualityCheckDefect)

defectId.description: Reference to the Defect type found. (Relationship: Defect 1:N QualityCheckDefect)

quantity.description: The number of instances of this specific defect found during the check.

notes.description: Specific notes related to this particular defect instance.

DispatchChallan.title: DispatchChallan
DispatchChallan.description: Generates a dispatch challan (delivery note) for outgoing goods.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DispatchChallan entity.

challanNumber.description: A unique, human-readable dispatch challan number.

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the SalesOrder being dispatched. (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N DispatchChallan)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer receiving the goods. (Relationship: Customer 1:N DispatchChallan)

dispatchDate.description: The date when the goods were dispatched.

shippingAddress.description: The address to which the goods are shipped.

status.description: The current status of the dispatch (e.g., 'Pending', 'Dispatched', 'Delivered').

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created this dispatch challan. (Relationship: User 1:N DispatchChallan)

DispatchChallanItem.title: DispatchChallanItem
DispatchChallanItem.description: Details a single finished good item included in a dispatch challan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DispatchChallanItem entity.

dispatchChallanId.description: Reference to the DispatchChallan this item belongs to. (Relationship: DispatchChallan 1:N DispatchChallanItem)

finishedGoodInventoryId.description: Reference to the specific FinishedGoodInventory item being dispatched. (Relationship: FinishedGoodInventory 1:N DispatchChallanItem)

quantityLabels.description: The quantity of labels dispatched for this item.

quantityRolls.description: The quantity of finished rolls dispatched for this item (if packed in rolls).

notes.description: Additional notes about the dispatched item.

PackingList.title: PackingList
PackingList.description: Generates a packing list detailing the contents of a shipment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PackingList entity.

packingListNumber.description: A unique, human-readable packing list number.

dispatchChallanId.description: Reference to the DispatchChallan this packing list is associated with. (Relationship: DispatchChallan 1:N PackingList)

packingDate.description: The date when the packing list was generated.

packedById.description: Reference to the User who prepared the packing list. (Relationship: User 1:N PackingList)

notes.description: Additional notes about the packing list.

PackingListItem.title: PackingListItem
PackingListItem.description: Details a single item within a packing list, including package specifics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PackingListItem entity.

packingListId.description: Reference to the PackingList this item belongs to. (Relationship: PackingList 1:N PackingListItem)

finishedGoodInventoryId.description: Reference to the specific FinishedGoodInventory item being packed. (Relationship: FinishedGoodInventory 1:N PackingListItem)

quantityLabels.description: The quantity of labels for this item in the package.

packageIdentifier.description: An identifier for the physical package (e.g., 'Box 1 of 5', 'Pallet A').

dimensions.description: The physical dimensions of the package (e.g., 'LWH: 30x20x15 cm').

weightKg.description: The weight of the package in kilograms.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Generates and manages customer invoices, including financial details and GST information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

salesOrderId.description: Reference to the SalesOrder this invoice is generated for. (Relationship: SalesOrder 1:N Invoice)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer being billed. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Invoice)

invoiceDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued.

dueDate.description: The date by which the invoice payment is due.

totalAmountExcludingGst.description: The total amount of the invoice before Goods and Services Tax (GST).

gstAmount.description: The total GST amount charged on the invoice.

totalAmountIncludingGst.description: The final total amount of the invoice, including GST.

status.description: The payment status of the invoice (e.g., 'Draft', 'Issued', 'Paid', 'Partially Paid', 'Overdue', 'Cancelled').

paymentTerms.description: The agreed payment terms for the invoice (e.g., 'Net 30', 'Due on Receipt').

tallyExportStatus.description: Indicates whether the invoice has been exported to Tally accounting software.

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created this invoice. (Relationship: User 1:N Invoice)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice was created.

InvoiceItem.title: InvoiceItem
InvoiceItem.description: Details a single line item within an invoice.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvoiceItem entity.

invoiceId.description: Reference to the Invoice this item belongs to. (Relationship: Invoice 1:N InvoiceItem)

description.description: A description of the invoiced item or service (e.g., 'Printing of 10000 labels, Product Code ABC').

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service billed.

unitPrice.description: The unit price of the item or service.

gstRatePercentage.description: The Goods and Services Tax (GST) rate applicable to this item, as a percentage (e.g., 18 for 18%).

itemAmountExcludingGst.description: The total amount for this line item, excluding GST.

itemGstAmount.description: The GST amount for this line item.

itemAmountIncludingGst.description: The total amount for this line item, including GST.

definition.description: Stores detailed cost and layout estimates. Includes `createdById` for owner-based authorization and `status` for lifecycle management. Accessible by creator, managers, and admins.

params.description: The unique identifier for the estimate.

definition.description: Manages design artwork files. Includes `uploadedById` for owner-based authorization. For artworks linked to an estimate, `estimateCreatedById` (denormalized owner of the linked estimate) will be included for authorization independence.

params.description: The unique identifier for the artwork.

definition.description: Defines Bills of Material for products. Includes `createdById` for owner-based authorization. Accessible by creator, managers, and admins.

params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Bill of Material.

params.description: The unique identifier for the BOM component.

definition.description: Represents confirmed customer orders. Includes `createdById` for owner-based authorization and `status` for lifecycle tracking. Links to `estimateId`.

params.description: The unique identifier for the sales order.

params.name: jobCardId

params.description: The unique identifier for the job card assignment.

definition.description: Lists material requirements for a job card. Includes denormalized `jobCardCreatedById` for authorization independence to allow subcollection access based on Job Card ownership.

params.description: The unique identifier of the parent Job Card.

definition.description: Tracks specific machine runs. Includes `createdById` for creator-based authorization, `operatorId` for operator-specific access, and `status` for workflow tracking. Links to `jobCardId`.

params.name: logEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the production log entry.

definition.description: Base collection for all physical stock items, providing common attributes and barcode tracking. Access is generally role-based (e.g., Managers for updates, Operators for read/scan).

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and DBAC principles, as mandated. 

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** To eliminate the need for `get()` calls in security rules, authorization-relevant fields are consistently denormalized. For top-level collections (e.g., `estimates`, `salesOrders`, `jobCards`), the `createdById` field directly links the document to its creator, enabling direct `request.auth.uid == resource.data.createdById` checks. For subcollections (e.g., `jobCards/{jobCardId}/assignments`), the parent's `createdById` (e.g., `jobCardCreatedById`) is explicitly denormalized into the subcollection document. This ensures that each document carries its own authorization context, allowing for atomic operations and simplifying security rules by avoiding cross-document reads.

**Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):** Each collection is designed to hold documents with a uniform security posture. Master data collections (e.g., `customers`, `materials`, `machines`, `rates`) are primarily accessible by administrative or managerial roles. Transactional collections (e.g., `estimates`, `salesOrders`, `productionRuns`) are secured based on `createdById` for individual users and role-based access for broader organizational visibility. This segregation simplifies rule sets by preventing the need for complex conditional logic within a single collection to differentiate access levels.

**DBAC (No Custom Claims):** User roles are implemented through dedicated top-level collections (e.g., `adminUsers/{userId}`, `managerUsers/{userId}`, `operatorUsers/{userId}`). The mere existence of a document at these paths signifies the user's role. Security rules can check `exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/adminUsers/$(request.auth.uid))` to determine a user's role without relying on custom claims or `get()` operations, providing a robust, database-centric approach to access control based on 'existence over content'.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** The structure facilitates secure and efficient `list` operations. By embedding `createdById` in transactional documents, client-side applications can construct queries that filter documents based on the `request.auth.uid` (e.g., `db.collection('estimates').where('createdById', '==', userId)`). Security rules then merely validate that the query parameters match the user's permissions, ensuring that only authorized data is returned and preventing unauthorized access attempts. For role-based listing (e.g., a Manager viewing all 'In Progress' Job Cards), rules would permit the `list` operation if the user holds the 'Manager' role, assuming the client-side query provides the necessary filters. The `status` field in transactional documents further aids in query-driven access control.

**Data Integrity and Naming:** Consistent semantic naming conventions are used for paths and parameters (e.g., `userId`, `estimateId`). Explicit state modeling (e.g., `status` field) ensures predictability. All relationships are defined by IDs, and where necessary for authorization independence, relevant parent IDs or owner IDs are denormalized.

**Note on Conflict:** This Firestore structure design adheres strictly to the provided JSON schema and the Firebase Architect instructions, which explicitly reference Firebase/Firestore concepts and output format. It overrides the conflicting 'PHP/MySQL' requirement found within the broader user request, as fulfilling both simultaneously is impossible within a single data structure recommendation.
